description: Marketing strategy and execution boards for campaigns, go-to-market launches, content planning, funnel optimization, and brand management

knowledge.name: Design Philosophy
knowledge.description: Why marketing boards exist, cognitive principles (Mere Exposure, AIDA, Zeigarnik, Anchoring), visual design principles, and the marketer's mindset

knowledge.name: Layout Patterns
knowledge.description: Five patterns (Campaign Planning, Content Calendar, Marketing Funnel, GTM Launch, Brand Guidelines) with ASCII diagrams and spatial rules

knowledge.name: Visual Guide
knowledge.description: Four palettes (Brand Forward, Modern Growth, Premium Brand, Community Impact), marketing typography, channel color system, and metric widgets

knowledge.name: Content Guide
knowledge.description: Content by board type (Campaign, Calendar, Funnel, GTM, Brand), writing guidelines, metric triad, audience specificity rules, and volume guidelines

knowledge.name: Build Process
knowledge.description: Six-phase workflow with marketing-specific Miro API code, channel columns, calendar grids, funnel shapes, and metric widgets

knowledge.name: Examples Reference
knowledge.description: Five detailed examples (SaaS Launch Campaign, Content Calendar, Funnel Analysis, GTM Launch, Brand Guidelines), anti-patterns, and transformations

knowledge.name: Variations
knowledge.description: Industry adaptations (SaaS, E-Commerce, Healthcare, Financial Services, Non-Profit, Agency), team sizes, complexity levels, and cross-board integrations

templates.name: Campaign Planning
templates.description: End-to-end marketing campaign board with objectives, channels, timeline, budget, and KPIs

templates.name: Go-to-Market Strategy
templates.description: Comprehensive GTM launch board covering positioning, pricing, channels, and launch timeline

templates.name: Content Calendar
templates.description: Monthly content planning board with editorial calendar, content types, channels, and publishing schedule

templates.name: Funnel Mapping
templates.description: Marketing and sales funnel visualization from awareness to conversion with metrics and optimization tactics

templates.name: Brand Guidelines
templates.description: Visual brand identity board with logo usage, color palette, typography, voice guidelines, and asset library
